en:
In the particular psychological situation of the dreamer, the allusion to the resurrection presents a delightful meaning as the cure of her husband's impotency. Then the whole problem would be solved. There is no need for me to point out in so many words the numerous wish-fulfilments contained in this material; they are obvious to the reader.

The important combination of the symbol " Luke 137" must be conceived as cryptomnesia, since the dreamer is quite unversed in the Bible. Both Flournoy [167] and myself [168] have already drawn attention to the important effects of this phenomenon. So far as one can be humanly certain, the question of any manipulation of the material with intent to deceive does not come into consideration in this case. Those well posted in psychoanalysis will be able to allay any such suspicion simply from the disposition and setting of the material as a whole.
zh:
在夢者特定的心理狀態下，關於復活的暗示呈現出一個令人愉悅的意義，即治癒她丈夫的陽痿。如此一來，整個問題便得以解決。我無需贅言指出這份材料中所包含的眾多願望滿足；它們對讀者而言是顯而易見的。

「路加福音 137」這個象徵的重要組合必須被理解為潛隱記憶，因為夢者對聖經相當不熟悉。弗盧努瓦[^167]與我本人[^168]都已提請注意此現象的重要影響。就人類所能確定的程度而言，在本案例中，任何為了欺騙而操縱材料的問題都不在考慮之列。那些精通精神分析的人，僅從整個材料的佈局與設定，便能消除任何這類疑慮。
